description: Defines the format, structure, naming, and validation rules for GAQP-compliant .intel sidecar files.

format.placement: Sidecar to the source file. Travels with the source document.
format.security_rule: A .intel sidecar may be more sensitive than its source document because it concentrates buried intelligence. Sidecars must inherit or exceed source file access controls. Never weaker.

structure.description: 14 required and recommended sections. All required sections must be present for a .intel file to be GAQP-compliant.

fields.deconstruction_profile: Instruction set identifier used for extraction
fields.claim_count: Total number of admitted claims in this package
fields.package_hash: SHA-256 hash of the claims section content

fields.source_id: Unique identifier for the source document
fields.source_type: Document type: pdf | docx | xlsx | pptx | transcript | email | html | other
fields.source_created_date: Document creation date — the authoritative temporal anchor for all claims
fields.source_hash: SHA-256 hash of source file at time of extraction
fields.language: Primary language of the source document

source_payload.description: Pointer to source content. Does not embed the source file.

fields.payload_pointer: File path or URI to the source document
fields.embedded_text: Plain text extraction of source content (optional, for search indexing)

schema.description: Schema and standards versions governing this package

fields.claim_schema_version: Version of the claim metadata schema used
fields.anchor_schema_version: Version of the source anchor schema used
fields.domain_modules_version: Version of the domain modules taxonomy used

anchors.description: Source anchor records for all admitted claims. One anchor per claim.

anchor_fields.anchor_id: Unique anchor identifier — referenced by claim.source_anchor_id
anchor_fields.source_sha256: SHA-256 hash of the source file — for drift detection
anchor_fields.speaker_turn: Speaker turn ID for transcript sources
anchor_fields.quote_hash: SHA-256 of the anchored text span

claims.description: Array of admitted claim records. Every record conforms to the canonical 28-field schema. This section contains ONLY source-local claims from this source document. No cross-document content permitted.
claims.source_locality_rule: A source .intel file that contains cross-document content fails validation and is non-compliant.

evidence.description: Structured evidence records extracted from the source — data points, statistics, citations, exhibits that support claims but are not claims themselves.

entities.description: Named entity records extracted from the source. Organizations, persons, products, geographies, regulations referenced across claims.

topics.description: Topic and concept tags at the document level. Summarizes the primary subjects addressed in the source.

controlled_tags.description: Tag registry for this .intel package. Lists all domain_tags and tags_pipe values used, with synonym mappings and preferred forms.

relationships.description: Local relationship records between claims within this .intel package. Source-local only — no cross-document relationships.

fields.errors: Array of validation errors — present if validation_status is failed
fields.warnings: Array of warnings — present if any non-blocking issues found
fields.compliance_level: Highest GAQP conformance level (L1-L7) achieved by this package

fields.inherited_from_source: Boolean — whether classification was inherited from source document

fields.llm_model: Model identifier used for extraction (if applicable)
fields.candidate_count: Total candidates identified before admission filtering
fields.admitted_count: Claims that passed all seven admission tests

validation_rules.claim_count_match: manifest.claim_count must equal claims array length
validation_rules.anchor_coverage: Every claim must have a corresponding anchor in the anchors section
validation_rules.source_locality: claims section must contain only claims from this source document. Any cross-document content = validation failure.
validation_rules.hash_integrity: manifest.package_hash must match SHA-256 of the serialized claims section
validation_rules.standards_version: manifest.standards_package_version must be a known released version of the schematic
validation_rules.no_stale_on_generate: source_binding.source_hash must match the actual source file at generation time

claims.claim_text: The company's top three customers represent 67% of total revenue, creating significant concentration risk.
claims.source_quote: Our top three customers accounted for approximately 67% of our total revenues for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025.
